steps.title: Spot Text 2's defense of the flatness
steps.content:
Text 2's key move is to reframe what Text 1 sees as a weakness.

Text 2 argues that Asimov's flat characters are not mistakes but deliberate choices aligned with his thematic intent: to portray human history at a vast timescale where individuals don't matter.

Text 2 explicitly states that his lack of characterization is central to his thematic aims.

steps.title: Match that defense to the answer
steps.content:
Text 2 defends flatness as a deliberate thematic choice, not a flaw; Asimov never aimed to prioritize individual characterization.

Choices A and B introduce distinctions Text 2 never makes, and C contradicts Asimov's intentional historical approach.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
